{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Shield of Gadrael
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gadrael]] has a black circle on his forearm called the [[Shield of Gadrael]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
